title: Policy: Restore Defaults with Policy applied
scenario: Restore Defaults action does not unlock or revert policy-locked settings on Poly device
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
3. Apply a device policy that locks specific settings (e.g., ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer, or Notifications).
4. Verify that the policy-locked settings are grayed out or otherwise indicated as locked in the app UI.
5. Go to Settings → Reset Device → Restore Defaults.
6. Tap "Restore Defaults" to confirm the action.
7. After the device resets and reconnects, navigate back to the policy-affected settings (e.g., Audio Settings → ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer, etc.).
expected: All settings locked by the policy remain locked and retain their policy-defined values. The "Restore Defaults" action does not unlock or change any policy-affected settings.
